nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-bellied honeyeater
nodes.summary: White-bellied honeyeater（Gliciphila notabilis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-bellied honeyeater。

nodes.name: White-bellied honeyeater
nodes.summary: The white-bellied honeyeater (Gliciphila notabilis), also known as the New Hebrides honeyeater and the Vanuatu honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to the Melanesian island nation of Vanuatu. This species was formerly placed in the genus Glycifohia. Two subspecies are recognised: G. n. notabilis Sharpe, RB, 1899 – northwestern Vanuatu, including Banks Islands G. n. superciliaris (Mayr, E, 1932) – Espiritu Santo to Epi (northern Vanuatu) References
